items.title: Introducing Advanced Account Security
items.summary: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.

items.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.

items.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.

items.title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
items.summary: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.

items.title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
items.summary: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.

items.title: Our principles
items.summary: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.

items.title: How to get started with Codex
items.summary: Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.

items.title: What is Codex?
items.summary: Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.

items.title: Codex settings
items.summary: Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow.

items.title: Plugins and skills
items.summary: Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.

items.title: Top 10 uses for Codex at work
items.summary: Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.

items.title: Automations
items.summary: Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.

items.title: Working with Codex
items.summary: Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.summary: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.

items.title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
items.summary: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.

items.title: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
items.summary: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.

items.title: Workspace agents
items.summary: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.

items.title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
items.summary: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.

items.title: Introducing OpenAI Privacy Filter
items.summary: OpenAI Privacy Filter is an open-weight model for detecting and redacting personally identifiable information (PII) in text with state-of-the-art accuracy

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0
items.summary: ChatGPT Images 2.0 introduces a state-of-the-art image generation model with improved text rendering, multilingual support, and advanced visual reasoning.

items.title: Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
items.summary: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.

items.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
items.summary: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything
items.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
